body:
APPROVE
Production wiring (server.go:4637 sets Resolver.Federation only when s.hub != nil; hubFederationProvider implements Spokes/FanOut) was already in place. This bead adds the missing integration test that boots Server.New + EnableHubMode, registers a spoke via /api/federation/register, posts federationNodes via /graphql, and asserts the spoke surfaces — plus a hub-off path test. All 4 AC items satisfied.
